name: Peekaboo Beans Inc.
summary: Peekaboo Beans Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells children playwear apparel in Canada and the United States. The company offers tees and tanks, dresses and tunics, leggings and pants, rompers and jumpers, skirts and shorts, pullovers and hoodies, underwear and undershirts, jackets and coats, and pants and shorts for boys and girls, as well as one pieces, bean playsuits, baby rompers, and leggings and pants for babies. It also provides accessories, such as backpacks, lunch bags, snack bags, water bottles, and baby accessories, as well as gift cards and masks. The company distributes its products through retail stores, social platforms, and online. Peekaboo Beans Inc. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Delta, Canada.
